description: Displays the computed probability of an event at a given canvas position. Shows the result as a fraction. Supports type() to select which probability to display: event, given, intersection, conditional, or sample.

arguments.name: position
arguments.description: Canvas position for the result text

arguments.name: type
arguments.description: Result type: conditional (P(E|F), default), given (P(F)), intersection (P(E∩F)), event (P(E)), sample (1/|S|)

arguments.name: display
arguments.description: Custom AsciiMath label for the left-hand side

arguments.name: color
arguments.description: Text color (defaults to the event's highlight color)

examples.expression:
S = sspace(coin(3), at(4,10), view(10,10))
E = event(S, "at least 2 H", fc(red))
eventresult(E, at(16,10), type(event), display("P(E)"))

E = event(S, "all same", given("sum > 5", c(steelblue)), fc(red))
eventresult(E, at(16,10), type(given), display("P(F)"))
eventresult(E, at(18,10), type(intersection), display("P(E nn F)"))
eventresult(E, at(20,10), type(conditional), display("P(E|F)"))
